assertions.title: Traffic classification — green = engaged new visitors

steps.action: Open rum-traffic with assigned domain/domainkey query params
steps.observed: Dashboard loaded and rendered chart + breakdowns

steps.action: Evaluate manual classification for visit=true AND engaged (click or >3 viewmedia/viewblock)
steps.expected: Manual green counts match adapter/chart green series

evidence.network: Bundles API loaded for 169 hourly URLs (from classification eval)

steps.observed: Manual yellow totals and per-bucket values matched adapter output

steps.action: Check mismatch counters for yellow series

evidence.network: Bundles API loaded for 169 hourly URLs (from classification eval)

steps.expected: Red represents visit=true AND not engaged bundles
steps.observed: Manual red totals and per-bucket values matched adapter output

steps.action: Check mismatch counters for red series

evidence.network: Bundles API loaded for 169 hourly URLs (from classification eval)

assertions.title: No console errors on load

steps.action: Reload rum-traffic with assigned query credentials and wait for network idle
steps.expected: Chart renders with zero error-level console messages
steps.observed: Error-level console messages appeared (403 resource failures and authentication errors in releases/autocomplete fetch)

assertions.issues: Console contained multiple error-level messages on load, including 'Failed to fetch releases' and 'Failed to load host autocomplete' with AUTHENTICATION_FAILED/403 context.

assertions.title: Removing a filter restores unfiltered state

steps.expected: No active filter tags and URL without filters param
steps.observed: filtersCount=0, activeFilterTags=[], URL had no filters param

steps.action: Apply filter by clicking URL breakdown value
steps.expected: Filter tag appears and URL contains filters parameter
steps.observed: filtersCount=1 and URL contained encoded filters parameter

steps.action: Click active filter tag remove control
steps.expected: Filter removed; chart/breakdowns/key metrics return to baseline; URL removes filters parameter
steps.observed: activeFilterTagCount=0, filtersCount=0, chartTotals/metricPairs matched baseline, URL returned to no filters parameter

assertions.title: Key metrics overlay is positioned over the chart

steps.expected: Rects overlap (overlay sits above/on chart area)

frictions.description: After initial URL-parameter auto-auth, app URL state rewrites remove domain/domainkey from the query string; subsequent validation evals had to read credentials from localStorage via rum-auth helper.
frictions.resolution: Used loadRumCredentials() from /js/rum/rum-auth.js in eval scripts.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request export returned 'No requests captured' in this session.
frictions.resolution: Used adapter eval output (urlCount=169) as request-volume evidence for classification assertions.

summary: Tested 6 traffic logic/stability assertions: 5 passed (VAL-TRAFFIC-009, 010, 011, 013, 014) and 1 failed (VAL-TRAFFIC-012 due error-level console messages on page load).
